content:
🔥 deepagents | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Developing and deploying sophisticated AI agents capable of multi-step, long-horizon tasks, with built-in support for complex operations like file manipulation and delegation.
✨ Key Features: • Sub-agents for task delegation • Filesystem access (read, write, edit, search) • Context management (summarization, offloading) • Shell access for sandbox execution • Persistent memory with pluggable backends
📖 Summary: Deep Agents is a Python agent harness built on LangGraph, designed for complex, long-horizon tasks. It provides an opinionated framework with features like sub-agents, filesystem access, and persistent memory, making it production-ready for various LLM applications.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
